title: x-capability
description: OpenAPI extension that makes API operations discoverable and consumable by AI agents. Add to every operation alongside standard OpenAPI fields.

intent.description: Plain-language description of what this operation accomplishes — written for both human developers and AI agents. Not a technical summary. Answer: 'what can I accomplish by calling this?'

domain.description: Business domain this capability belongs to.

workflow.description: The workflow or process this capability participates in.

side-effects.description: Side effects this operation produces. Required for mutating operations.

composable-with.description: operationIds of other capabilities this can be chained with in a workflow. Agents use this for workflow planning.

idempotency.description: 'supported' = via Idempotency-Key header. 'natural' = inherently idempotent (GET, PUT). 'not-supported' = retries may cause duplicates.

safety.description: Safety classification for agent decision-making. 'safe' = read-only, no side effects. 'mutating' = creates or modifies state. 'destructive' = deletes or irreversible action.
